content:
```markdown
# KingdomConfig Interface Summary

The `KingdomConfig` interface defines the configuration settings for the kingdom system. Below is a brief description of each field and its purpose:

| Field Name               | Type               | Description                                                                                   |
|--------------------------|--------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `name`                   | `string`           | The name of the kingdom.                                                                      |
| `description`            | `string`           | A brief description of the kingdom's purpose or theme.                                       |
| `version`                | `string`           | The current version of the kingdom configuration.                                            |
| `defaultAgent`           | `string`           | Identifier for the default agent to be used within the kingdom.                              |
| `logRetentionDays`       | `number`           | Number of days to retain detailed event logs before purging.                                |
| `cryptRetention`         | `boolean`          | Flag indicating whether permanent crypt records should be maintained indefinitely.          |
| `maxConcurrentTasks`     | `number`           | Maximum number of tasks that can run concurrently in the kingdom.                            |
| `enableAuditTrail`       | `boolean`          | Enables or disables the audit trail logging feature.                                        |
| `incidentNotification`   | `string[]`         | List of email addresses or channels to notify in case of incidents.                         |
| `retryPolicy`            | `object`           | Configuration object defining retry behavior for failed tasks, including max retries and delay intervals. |
| `securityLevel`          | `'low' | 'medium' | 'high'` | Defines the security level applied to the kingdom's operations and data handling.           |
| `allowedModels`          | `string[]`         | List of allowed model identifiers that can be invoked within the kingdom.                   |
| `taskTimeoutSeconds`     | `number`           | Default timeout in seconds for tasks before they are considered failed or cancelled.        |
| `enableNotifications`    | `boolean`          | Enables or disables user notifications for task and job status changes.                     |
| `dataRetentionPolicy`    | `object`           | Defines policies for data retention beyond logs, such as task results and artifacts.        |
| `createdAt`              | `string`           | ISO 8601 timestamp of when the kingdom configuration was created.                           |
| `updatedAt`              | `string`           | ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to the kingdom configuration.                         |

This interface centralizes all configurable aspects of the kingdom, ensuring consistent behavior and governance across the system.
```
